x-enumeration-literals.name: Dividend Declaration Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to declare a dividend, including amount, type, and key dates (e.g., record date, payment date).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Dividend Entitlement Calculation Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to determine eligible holders and calculate their dividend amounts based on positions and entitlements.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Dividend Payment Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to distribute dividend amounts (cash or securities) to entitled parties.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Dividend Reinvestment Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to reinvest dividends into additional shares or units instead of paying cash (e.g., DRIP).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Dividend Withholding Tax Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to calculate and deduct applicable taxes from dividend payments.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Dividend Adjustment Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to correct or modify dividend amounts due to errors, corporate actions, or changes in entitlement.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Dividend Reversal Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to reverse previously processed dividend payments due to errors or cancellations.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Scheduled Dividend Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to process dividends automatically according to predefined schedules or corporate action timelines.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Conditional Dividend Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to execute dividend actions only when specific conditions are met (e.g., regulatory approval, profit thresholds).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Dividend Reporting Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to generate reports on dividend declarations, payments, and entitlements.
